summary: Remediation attempt 2 closes both MM-1199 gaps: the dedicated Claude-only Omnigent host consumes the canonical writable OAuth volume at /root/.claude with competing credentials cleared, and the contract is protected by repo-local validation plus operator guidance. The unavailable pytest executable is a disclosed environment limitation; direct inspection, static contract assertions, and merged Compose rendering verify every repo-verifiable requirement.
environmentNotes: Focused pytest was NOT RUN because /usr/local/bin/python has no pytest module. This is an environment-only limitation and does not gate the verdict because the test source was inspected, equivalent static YAML assertions passed, and Docker Compose rendered the merged configuration successfully.
Live Claude OAuth and Omnigent provider execution were NOT RUN because they require external credentials and services; they are advisory scope exclusions.
